prompt: A CourierMatch Operations & Audit iOS application for fully offline courier dispatching, itinerary-based order matching, and compliant performance scoring. The system supports multiple roles including Courier (creates itineraries with origin, destination, departure window, vehicle type, and optional stops), Operations Dispatcher (triages and assigns orders), Reviewer (handles disputes and manual scoring reviews), Customer Service (manages order notes and dispute intake), Finance (reviews adjustments), and Administrator (controls configuration and access). The application ranks eligible orders using an on-the-way match scoring algorithm that factors detour distance (default max 8 miles), pickup/drop-off time window overlap (minimum 20 minutes), and capacity constraints, producing explanation strings for transparency. Order lifecycle events (Assigned, Picked Up, Delivered, Dispute Opened) trigger in-app notifications only, with offline-safe templating, rate limiting (max 5 per minute), and read/acknowledgment tracking. Delivery quality scoring combines automated checks (on-time within 10 minutes, photo proof, signature capture) and manual rubric-based grading with full audit trails for appeals, including reviewer assignment and before/after score tracking. Authentication is local-only using username/password with optional biometric authentication (Face ID/Touch ID), session timeout after 15 minutes, device login history, admin-forced logout, password policies (minimum 12 characters with number and symbol), lockout after 5 failed attempts, CAPTCHA after 3 failures, and permission-change auditing. Data persistence is fully on-device using Core Data with multi-tenant support (tenantId), encryption of sensitive data via iOS Keychain and file protection, and masking of identifiers on sensitive screens. Data normalization includes address formatting (US states, ZIP), date/time standards, and deduplication constraints on orders. The system handles concurrent edits using optimistic locking with conflict resolution prompts. Attachments (JPG/PNG/PDF up to 10MB) are stored in the app sandbox with hashing for tamper detection and a 30-day cleanup job. The UI is built with UIKit, Auto Layout, Safe Area, supports iPhone/iPad, Split View, orientation changes, Dark Mode, Dynamic Type, and haptic feedback, with biometric confirmation for destructive actions. Background tasks handle ranking recomputation and notification cleanup with battery optimization, and optional reduced-accuracy location is used for origin prefilling.
database: Core Data (encrypted on-device storage) and iOS Keychain (for sensitive secrets)
